title: RapidMeta Oncology | Zolbetuximab in CLDN18.2+ HER2- Gastric/GEJ Adenocarcinoma (1L) v1.0
hero_h2: Zolbetuximab + Chemotherapy in CLDN18.2+ Gastric/GEJ Cancer (1L)

pico.pop: Adults with locally advanced unresectable or metastatic CLDN18.2-positive (>=75% of tumour cells with moderate-to-strong staining), HER2-negative, gastric or gastroesophageal junction adenocarcinoma; treatment-naive in advanced setting
pico.int: Zolbetuximab 800 mg/m2 loading then 600 mg/m2 IV every 3 weeks + platinum-fluoropyrimidine chemotherapy (mFOLFOX6 or CAPOX)
pico.subgroup: Chemotherapy backbone (mFOLFOX6 vs CAPOX), prior gastrectomy, geographic region, ECOG PS

real_data_entries.name: SPOTLIGHT
real_data_entries.group: CLDN18.2+ HER2- gastric/GEJ adenocarcinoma 1L, zolbetuximab + mFOLFOX6 vs placebo + mFOLFOX6 (PFS primary)

allOutcomes.title: Investigator-assessed progression-free survival (primary; HR vs placebo + mFOLFOX6)

real_data_entries.snippet: Source: Shitara K et al. Lancet 2023;401:1655-1668 (SPOTLIGHT).

real_data_entries.name: GLOW
real_data_entries.group: CLDN18.2+ HER2- gastric/GEJ adenocarcinoma 1L, zolbetuximab + CAPOX vs placebo + CAPOX (replicate; PFS primary)

allOutcomes.title: Investigator-assessed progression-free survival (primary; HR vs placebo + CAPOX)

real_data_entries.snippet: Source: Shah MA et al. Nat Med 2023;29:2133-2141 (GLOW; CAPOX backbone replicate).
